channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Judge disagrees with Soto's conclusion that Mets have better chance for titles than Yankees
item.description: Aaron Judge naturally takes issue with Juan Soto’s conclusion that the New York Mets have a better chance to win World Series titles than the Yankees.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Devers insists he's the Red Sox's third baseman even with Bregman now on the team
item.description: FORT MYERS, Fla. (AP) — The Red Sox's ballyhooed signing of Alex Bregman was met with considerable resistance Monday when Rafael Devers said he wouldn't cede third base.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Auburn stays at No. 1 in AP Top 25 for 6th straight week, Florida up to No. 2; Louisville returns
item.description: Auburn's win at Alabama assured the Tigers would keep the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press Top 25 men's college basketball poll for a sixth consecutive week.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NRG Energy named first official sponsor for FIFA World Cup 2026 in Houston
item.description: "Our partnership with the World Cup Houston Host Committee marks an important moment for NRG and the city of Houston," said Gin Kinney, NRG Chief Administrative Officer in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Ahmed Humble, KPRC 2

item.title: Notre Dame moves up to No. 1 in AP poll for first time since 2019 after UCLA suffers 1st loss
item.description: Notre Dame is the new No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll, ascending to the top spot Monday for the first time since 2019. The Fighting Irish replaced UCLA, which lost its first game of the season last week, falling to rival USC, 71-60. Notre Dame was last No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Canilao: Why NCS’s new basketball playoff format needs a major fix ASAP
item.description: Dougherty Valley boys snubbed for Open Division as section relies on computer rankings to divide teams
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: LeBron James takes heat for late decision to skip NBA All-Star Game
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James drew some blowback on Sunday night as he announced he would not participate in the All-Star Game 90 minutes before gametime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The All-Star verdicts are in, and the player reaction to the mini-tournament is mixed
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The verdicts were mixed, as would be expected. The NBA's All-Star Game mini-tournament is now complete, Shaq's OGs getting the win in the four-team, three-game event where the first squad to score 40 points in each game got the victory. Some players liked it. Some didn't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods expects golf to 'heal quickly' when PGA Tour gets deal with Saudis
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Tiger Woods expects the fractured landscape of golf to “heal quickly” when the PGA Tour and the Saudi backers of rival LIV Golf reach an agreement that appears to be imminent.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ballard leads Wichita State to 84-79 OT win over No. 14 Memphis
item.description: WICHITA, Kan. (AP) — Quincy Ballard scored 14 of his 19 points in the second half and overtime to help Wichita State beat No. 14 Memphis 84-79 on Sunday. Bijan Cortes hit a 3 to give the Shockers a 78-77 lead with 1:10 remaining in OT. Wichita State never relinquished the lead from that point.
item.dc:creator: CODY FRIESEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool continues Premier League title charge and Man United's season keeps getting worse
item.description: Liverpool continued its charge toward the Premier League title on Sunday with a 2-1 win against Wolverhampton. For Manchester United, it just keeps getting worse after a 1-0 loss at Tottenham. The fortunes of England’s two most successful teams could hardly be more contrasting.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ESPN star Stephen A Smith makes stance on trans inclusion in women's sports clear
item.description: ESPN star pundit Stephen A. Smith made his stance on trans inclusion in women's and girls' sports clear during an interview at Super Bowl LIX radio row.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 7 more massage therapists accuse Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: Report
item.description: Seven more massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, the Baltimore Banner reported Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Michigan State coach Tom Izzo passes Bob Knight for most Big Ten conference wins
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Michigan State’s Tom Izzo followed one of the most disappointing losses of his coaching career with a record-setting victory. For Illinois, it was a game in which nothing went right after halftime — or during it, thanks to an unfortunate jersey-raising snafu. The No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Former White Sox All-Star, World Series Champion Bobby Jenks undergoing stomach cancer treatment
item.description: Bobby Jenks, a two-time All-Star closer and World Series champion with the Chicago White Sox, is being treated for stomach cancer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UCSD student gets the job of a lifetime at Genesis Invitational
item.description: Ruth Nguyen, an 18-year-old student at UCSD, earned the opportunity to announce the names of golf stars at The Genesis Invitational through the TGR Foundation, founded by Tiger Woods, and its Earl Woods Scholarship program.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Padres release 2025 spring broadcast schedule
item.description: The San Diego Padres unveiled their 2025 spring broadcast schedule Thursday, stirring excitement for the approaching season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz fall to Clippers in final game before All-Star break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Norman Powell scored a season-high 41 points and James Harden added 32 to lift the Los Angeles Clippers to a 120-116 overtime victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night. Harden also had 10 rebounds, seven assists and three steals.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rain doesn't disappoint golf fans at Genesis Invitational
item.description: Rainy weather isn’t stopping golf fans from enjoying the biggest tournament in San Diego this week, as the Genesis Invitational takes over Torrey Pines Golf Course.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Swimming continues dominance at RMAC Championships
item.description: The Mesa Mavericks are gearing up for Nationals next month, putting their talent on full display at the RMAC Championships
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: CMU Men's Wrestling "Battle in Brownson" recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) —Western Colorado Tops Colorado Mesa in ‘Battle in Brownson’ In a heated rivalry matchup inside Brownson Arena, the Colorado Mesa Mavericks faced off against the Western Colorado Mountaineers in the annual Battle in Brownson.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Muni will be free for NBA-All Star, Lunar New Year weekend, SFMTA announces
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- With thousands of people expected to descend on San Francisco this weekend for the NBA All-Stars and Lunar New Year Parade, officials are urging people to leave their cars at home.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: White Sox sign veteran CF Michael A. Taylor to 1-year deal
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Center fielder Michael A. Taylor and the Chicago White Sox have agreed to a $1.95 million, one-year contract. Chicago announced the agreement Wednesday. Taylor spent last season with the Pittsburgh Pirates, batting .193 with five home runs, 21 RBI and a .543 OPS in 113 games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Countdown to the 2025 Daytona 500: Drivers get ready for season opener
item.description: The biggest race in NASCAR is only a few days away, where 40 drivers will compete to win “The Great American Race.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 48, The Bishop's School 37
item.description: A big time coastal league matchup between SFC and Bishop's in boys basketball. The last time these 2 teams faced off the SFC Eagles won by just 2 points.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Oakland high school gym named after NBA legend, alumnus Bill Russell set to open
item.description: (KRON/BCN) -- The Oakland Unified School District will hold a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Wednesday for a new school gymnasium at McClymonds High School named after late NBA legend Bill Russell, who was an alumnus of the school. The ceremony will take place at 3:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Chicago State begins search for head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The South Side's Chicago State University launched a search to find their first head football coach Tuesday. “We are excited to reach this milestone in our football planning.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lakers blow past Jazz in Doncic debut, 132-113
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz were no match for the Lakers in the much-anticipated debut of Luka Doncic. Doncic had 14 points, five rebounds and four assists in his Lakers debut as Los Angeles beat the Utah Jazz 132-113 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
